# M Models & Talent Agency

> A Global Platform for Emerging Models & Creative Talent

M Models & Talent is a premier modeling agency connecting Canadian talent to the global fashion industry. We operate across Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary, and Japan, focusing on scouting, career development, and editorial placement.

## Core Services
- **Talent Management**: Representing professional models and creative influencers.
- **Scouting**: Discovering new faces through our "Become a Model" program.
- **Client Services**: Providing high-end talent for editorial, runway, and commercial projects.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://mmodels.ca/index.html): Regional overview and agency mission.
- [Models](https://mmodels.ca/models.html): Our primary portfolio of fashion models.
- [Influencers](https://mmodels.ca/influencers.html): Creative talent and digital personalities.
- [Talent Introduction](https://mmodels.ca/talent-introduction.html): Motion portfolios and new face introductions.
- [Become a Model](https://mmodels.ca/become-a-model.html): Application portal for aspiring talent.
- [Hire a Model](https://mmodels.ca/hire-a-model.html): Booking portal for clients.

## Regional Hubs
- [Toronto](https://mmodels.ca/toronto.html)
- [Vancouver](https://mmodels.ca/vancouver.html)
- [Calgary](https://mmodels.ca/calgary.html)
